news.title: 98.4% of mothers, children in Bangladesh lack health insurance: BBS
news.snippet: The latest BBS MICS survey found that fewer than 2% of mothers and children in Bangladesh are covered by health insurance, highlighting the country's limited financial protection against healthcare costs.

news.title: BB governor urges new Al-Arafah Islami Bank board to step up loan recovery

news.title: 3 of Bangladeshi family killed in Saudi road crash on way to Umrah
news.snippet: A Bangladeshi family travelling from Riyadh to Makkah to perform Umrah met with a fatal road accident after their car was reportedly struck from behind by a heavy vehicle.

news.title: President Shahabuddin, former ally of ousted PM Hasina, to resign on Friday: Reuters

news.title: Bangladesh ramps up anti-money laundering reforms before global review

news.title: Over 15 million people face acute food insecurity in Bangladesh: Report
news.snippet: A new national food security analysis warns that 15.3 million people are currently experiencing acute food insecurity, with the number projected to rise to 18.1 million by the end of 2026 without timely intervention.

news.title: Speaker likely to return early from Thailand amid speculation over president's resignation
